PathOfBuilding2.Notes:
CHANGES TO BUILD FROM 0.2 TO 0.3:
dark effigy quality nerfed (no longer gives wither) contagion quality changed (applies to more targets on initial cast, overall a buff) Eldritch Empowerment ascendancy node changed (skills will cost slightly more ES per cast, shouldn't be a problem) can't weapon swap convalescence anymore (I didn't do this anyway so no change) chaos bolt skill from chaos wands can help build wither stacks can't weapon swap blink anymore (probably just dont use it at all anymore)
UNCONFIRMED SUPPORT GEM CHANGES:
execute support rank 3 extra damage while low life = buff for dark effigy MAYBE use new rank 3 arcane tempo for effigy, stacking cast speed per different spell used in past 8 seconds
DUPLICATE SUPPORT GEM CHANGES/ADDITIONS
Sigil of Power: Magnified effect + Persistence Contagion: MAYBE drop unleash for arcane tempo Withering Presence: Chaos mastery Despair: Magnified effect (might need 6L, or can drop inspiration for it if mana costs are lowered by enough) Blasphemy: Magnified effect
